holdings.infoBox: NFXS is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily NFLX Bear 1X ETF (NFXS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Netflix stock. NFXS was launched on Oct 3, 2024 and is issued by Direxion.
